CHILDHOOD JOURNEY TIMELINE  
From First Day to Graduation and Beyond...  

15 Jun 2023  
First Day at School  
Aarav’s first step towards his learning journey.  

12 Aug 2023  
First Drawing  
Explored colors and created his first beautiful drawing.  

24 Nov 2023  
First Performance  
Participated in rhyme recitation and won everyone’s hearts.  

26 Jan 2024  
First Achievement  
Received a medal for good participation.  

10 Apr 2024  
Certificate Earned  
Completed “Art & Craft” activity program.  

20 Dec 2024  
Annual Day  
Confident performance on the big stage.  

15 Jun 2026  
Graduation Day  
A proud moment as Aarav steps into a new chapter.  

And Many More Beautiful Memories to Create... ❤️
